articles.title: Heating Oil Tumbles Tracking Curde Lower
articles.expand: Heating oil futures tumbled more than 6% to below $3.40 per gallon on Monday, erasing a dramatic 19% surge earlier in the session, after signals of a large potential G7 strategic reserve release and reassuring comments from the White House reversed a historic rally. articles.expand: US natural gas futures fell more than 4% to below $3.05 per MMBtu on Monday, as growing expectations of a rapid de-escalation in the Middle East pared back the risk premium across the energy complex. articles.title: US Stocks Recover to Close Much Higher
articles.expand: US equities staged a sharp reversal on Monday, with the S P 500 climbing 0.9%, the Dow advancing 0.5%, and the Nasdaq jumping 1.3%. articles.title: DAX at Over 3-Month Low
articles.expand: Frankfurt’s DAX 40 trimmed steep early losses to finish about 0.8% lower at 23,394 on Monday, its weakest close since November 2025, as investors grew increasingly concerned about the impact of a prolonged war on the global economy.
